mo_ta_hinh_anh: Beach resort morning. LEFT side: Character 1 (Boy in COW onesie) standing on a wooden boardwalk near a beach villa, holding a resort map and looking amazed at the blue sea. RIGHT side: Character 2 (Boy in SEAL onesie) pulling a small pink suitcase and pointing excitedly toward the infinity pool. Sunny tropical vacation mood, palm trees, ocean sparkling in the background. Clean black panel border. Exactly 2 empty speech bubbles.
thoai_phai: Nhanh lên, mình đi check-in nào!

mo_ta_hinh_anh: Resort lobby with cool sea breeze and bright decorations. LEFT side: Character 1 (Boy in COW onesie) leaning over the front desk, nervously searching every pocket for the booking slip. RIGHT side: Character 2 (Boy in SEAL onesie) holding up a phone with the reservation code on screen, smiling confidently. Vacation comedy vibe, neat interior, luggage nearby. Clean black panel border. Exactly 2 empty speech bubbles.
thoai_trai: Chết rồi, tớ quên mã đặt phòng!
thoai_phai: Bình tĩnh, tớ lưu sẵn trong điện thoại nè.

mo_ta_hinh_anh: Tall vertical resort scene near the seaside room balcony. LEFT side: Character 1 (Boy in COW onesie) on the balcony reaching toward the clothes rack, a strong gust lifting his sun hat away. RIGHT side: Character 2 (Boy in SEAL onesie) half-running out of the room to grab the flying hat. Blue sky, curtains blowing, dynamic vertical composition. Clean black panel border. Exactly 2 empty speech bubbles.
thoai_trai: Nón của tớ bay mất rồi!
thoai_phai: Đứng yên đó, để tớ chụp lại!

mo_ta_hinh_anh: Wide poolside scene at the beach resort. LEFT side: Character 1 (Boy in COW onesie) slipping beside the pool while trying to carry two giant coconuts, water splashing everywhere. RIGHT side: Character 2 (Boy in SEAL onesie) rushing forward with a pool towel, shocked but trying not to laugh. Holiday comedy, bright noon light, deck chairs and sea horizon visible. Clean black panel border. Exactly 2 empty speech bubbles.
thoai_trai: Trái dừa to quá ôm không nổi!
thoai_phai: Cậu đang đi nghỉ hay diễn xiếc vậy?

mo_ta_hinh_anh: Cozy evening seafood dinner by the beach. LEFT side: Character 1 (Boy in COW onesie) sitting at a lantern-lit table with watery eyes after eating a spoon of extra spicy seafood noodles. RIGHT side: Character 2 (Boy in SEAL onesie) offering a cold coconut drink while laughing kindly. Warm sunset vacation atmosphere, string lights, gentle waves behind. Clean black panel border. Exactly 2 empty speech bubbles.
thoai_trai: Cay quá... nhưng ngon thiệt á...
thoai_phai: Uống ngụm này đi rồi mình gọi thêm món nữa!

mo_ta_hinh_anh: Final sunset beach panorama. LEFT side: Character 1 (Boy in COW onesie) and RIGHT side: Character 2 (Boy in SEAL onesie) sitting together on a beach mat, watching the orange sunset with seashells, snacks, and footprints around them. Peaceful resort farewell mood, romantic friendship comedy ending, glowing sky and ocean waves. Clean black panel border. Exactly 2 empty speech bubbles.
thoai_trai: Chuyến này vui hơn tớ tưởng nhiều luôn.
thoai_phai: Lần sau mình quay lại nghỉ tiếp nha!
